chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Revision Application No.S-19 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 08.04.2022. Rao Faisal Ali, Advocate for the applicant. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. == The facts in brief necessary for disposal of instant revision application are that Isuzo Truck, was found used in commission of incident outcome of F.I.R No. 26 of 2022 of P.S Shadi Pali for transporting Gutka and Mainpuri. The applicant applied for its custody on supardari being its owner by making such application, it was dismissed by learned Sessions Judge Umerkot vide order dated 18.02.2022, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court by way of instant revision application. It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that the applicant being owner of the subject vehicle could not be denied its custody on supardari, as it is his only source of income. Learned Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh has sought for dismissal of instant revision application by contending that it has been used in commission of incident which is affecting the society at large. Heard arguments and perused the record. The applicant is appearing to be owner of the subject vehicle which is said to be soul source of his earning; the investigation of the case is over, therefore, no useful purpose would be served, if the applicant is denied its custody on supardari. Impugned order is therefore set-aside; consequently the applicant is allowed to take custody of the subject vehicle on superdari to his furnishing surety in sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of learned Trial Court.

The applicant is appearing to be owner of the subject vehicle which is said to be soul source of his earning; the investigation of the case is over, therefore, no useful purpose would be served, if the applicant is denied its custody on supardari. Impugned order is therefore set-aside; consequently the applicant is allowed to take custody of the subject vehicle on superdari to his furnishing surety in sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of learned Trial Court. The instant revision application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Muhammad Danish*
